items.title: Solana eyes 64.8K daily SOL burn – Is Hyperliquid’s rise behind it?
items.whyYouShouldCare: A significant daily SOL burn could enhance scarcity, potentially increasing SOL's value as Hyperliquid gains traction within the Solana ecosystem.

items.title: Cosmos-based Gravity Bridge halts bridge after reported $5.4M exploit
items.whyYouShouldCare: The Gravity Bridge exploit raises concerns about cross-chain security, which may impact user confidence in similar bridges within the Solana ecosystem.

items.title: ONDO nears $0.34 support after $2.13mln whale transfer – Can bulls defend it?
items.whyYouShouldCare: Whale activity near key support levels can signal market sentiment, influencing liquidity and price stability for ONDO and potentially affecting related assets.
